title: AI Services Sales Playbook
subtitle: Field Manual for Selling Missed Call Text-Back & AI Automation to Naples Local Businesses
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## 1. THE OFFER

### What We Sell

**Missed Call Text-Back** — when a call goes unanswered, an automatic text goes out within 10 seconds: "Hey, sorry we missed your call. How can we help?" Simple, human, instant.

### Pricing

| Item | Price | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| Setup (first 3 clients) | FREE | Case study clients — proof before profit |
| Setup (after first 3) | $497 one-time | Standard setup fee |
| Monthly service | $297/mo | Ongoing text-back + lead capture |
| Cancel | Anytime | No contracts, no commitments |

### Why This Offer Works

- **Lowest friction**: Easy to explain, easy to demo, easy to close
- **Fastest ROI proof**: One recovered call pays for the entire month
- **Foot-in-the-door**: Opens the upsell ladder naturally

### The Math (Use This in Every Pitch)

Average service call value: $200-500. Miss 5 calls/week = $4,000-10,000/month walking to competitors. Text-back cost: $297/month. **ROI: 10-30x.**

### Upsell Ladder

| Tier | Price | What They Get |
|------|-------|---------------|
| Missed Call Text-Back | $297/mo | Auto-text on missed calls, lead capture |
| AI Receptionist | $500-1,000/mo | Virtual phone answerer, booking, FAQs, call routing |
| Full Automation Stack | $2,000-5,000/mo | Multi-channel lead capture, follow-up sequences, CRM, dashboard |

---

## 2. TARGET MARKET

### Primary: Naples Local Service Businesses

- HVAC companies
- Plumbing companies
- Electrical contractors
- Landscaping / lawn care
- Roofing companies
- Pest control
- Pool service / maintenance
- Auto repair shops

### Secondary (Emerging High-Value — Move to Primary If You Land One)

**Medical & Healthcare** — Dental practices, med spas, physical therapy clinics, urgent care, dermatology, chiropractic. These are the HIGHEST-VALUE AI services buyers right now:
- High call volume (appointment requests, insurance questions, cancellations)
- Staff are overwhelmed — missed calls are a real problem they already feel
- Patient experience expectations are rising — instant response = competitive advantage
- Healthcare AI adoption is accelerating in 2025-2026 — they've heard about it and want it
- Average ticket: dental ($800-2,000/appointment), med spa ($500-3,000/visit) — one recovered call = 1-10 months of your service fee
- Key decision-maker: practice owner or office manager (not a committee)
- Pitch angle: "Other practices in Naples are already doing this" — social proof closes fast

**Legal Offices** — Personal injury, family law. High inbound call volume, after-hours leads are common.

**Property Management** — High call volume, tenant + owner communication, after-hours emergencies.

**Restaurants** — Reservations, takeout orders, missed call recovery during rushes.

### Skip These (Don't Waste Time)

- B2B companies that sell through relationships/bids
- Construction subs with 30+ year relationships
- Insurance partnerships (referral-only business)
- Anyone who doesn't get inbound calls from strangers

### Lead Validation Checklist (Before You Reach Out)

- Is the business active and answering calls?
- How do they acquire customers? (Inbound calls = good. Bids/referrals only = skip.)
- Would they care about our pitch? (Service business with missed call pain = yes.)
- What's their current marketing sophistication? (No website or basic site = opportunity.)
- Is the pain point real? (Check Google reviews — complaints about "never called back" = gold.)

---

## 3. THE SALES PIPELINE

### Stage 1: PROSPECTING

- Apollo MCP for email/phone lookup
- Google Maps searches: "HVAC Naples FL", "plumber near me" etc.
- Warm network: Ask everyone "know a business owner who misses calls?"
- In-person walk-ins: Drive by shops, hand out card, quick intro

### Stage 2: FIRST TOUCH

Personalized email or DM referencing a **specific** pain point:
- "I noticed your website doesn't have a chat widget..."
- "I called your business at 6pm and got voicemail..."
- "I saw a Google review mentioning slow response time..."

### Stage 3: FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE

| Day | Action | Angle |
|-----|--------|-------|
| Day 0 | First touch email | Specific pain + proof |
| Day 2-3 | Bump email | "Did you see my note?" + new angle |
| Day 5 | New value angle | ROI math or competitor example |
| Day 7 | Phone call attempt | Direct, warm, reference emails |
| Day 10 | Breakup email | "Last note on this" — scarcity close |

### Stage 4: DISCOVERY CALL

15-minute call via Calendly: **calendly.com/wmarceau/ai-services-discovery-call**

### Stage 5: LIVE DEMO

Call their business from your phone. Let it ring. Show what happens (voicemail or nothing). Then show what text-back does — instant response, lead captured, conversation started.

### Stage 6: CASE STUDY OFFER

"Let me set this up free. Run it 2 weeks. You see the results. If it works, $297/month to keep it. If not, I turn it off. No charge."

### Stage 7: CONVERSION

| Day | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Day 10 | Check-in with results: "You've recovered X leads this week" |
| Day 13 | Trial ending reminder: "Your free trial wraps up tomorrow" |
| Day 14 | Convert to $297/mo Stripe subscription or deactivate |

### Stage 8: REFERRAL

"Know anyone else who could use this?" — Ask every single time.

---

## 4. DISCOVERY CALL SCRIPT

### Opening (2 min)

"Thanks for taking the time. Tell me about your business — how do you get most of your customers right now?"

*Listen. Take notes. Mirror their language back to them.*

### Pain Questions (5 min)

- "What happens when you miss a call?"
- "How often does that happen — once a day? More?"
- "What do you think that costs you per month?"
- "Who's answering the phone when you're on a job?"
- "What happens to leads that come in after hours?"

### Agitate (2 min)

"So if you're missing even 5 calls a week, and your average job is $200-500... that's $4,000 to $10,000 a month walking straight to competitors. Not because your service is bad — just because nobody picked up the phone."

### Solution (3 min)

"What if every missed call got an instant text back within 10 seconds? Not a robot call — a friendly text that says 'Hey, sorry we missed your call. How can we help?' The customer replies, you see it on your phone, and now you've got a conversation going instead of a lost lead."

### Close (3 min)

"Here's what I'll do. I'll set it up this week. Free. Run it for 2 weeks. You see the actual numbers — how many calls you missed, how many texts went out, how many customers replied. If it's working, $297 a month to keep it running. If not, I turn it off. No charge. No risk on your end."

### If They Say Yes

"Great. I need your business phone number, your hours, and a list of your most common services. I'll have it running by [day]. You'll get a text from me when it's live."

### If They Need to Think

"Totally understand. The trial is completely free — no card, no commitment. I just need 10 minutes to set it up. Want me to go ahead so you can see real results before deciding?"

---

## 5. OBJECTION HANDLING

### "We're doing fine / don't need it"

"When was the last time you checked how many calls go to voicemail? Most business owners are surprised — they think they catch everything, but the data shows 30% of calls go unanswered on average. Want me to show you how to check?"

### "That sounds expensive"

"It's $297 a month. If it recovers one job worth $300 or more, it paid for itself on day one. And I'll prove it works with real data before you pay anything."

### "I don't trust AI"

"Totally fair. But this isn't a robot answering your phone. It's a text message — a real, friendly message from your business saying 'Sorry we missed your call, how can we help?' Customers love it because they'd rather text than leave a voicemail anyway."

### "Let me think about it"

"Of course. Quick question though — the trial is free, no card required. Want me to just set it up so you can see real numbers before you decide? That way you're not guessing, you're looking at actual results."

### "We already have a system"

"Great — what are you using? (Listen.) How's that working for after-hours calls? (Find the gap.) What about weekends? (Find another gap.) Most systems have blind spots — I usually find at least one."

### "What if customers don't like texting?"

"89% of consumers prefer texting over calling — it's actually the most preferred communication channel. And this doesn't replace your phone. It catches the ones you miss. The customer can always call back too."

### "I need to talk to my partner"

"Makes total sense. Would it help if I put together a one-page summary with the ROI math so you can show them exactly what this does? I can email it in 5 minutes."

---

## 6. AI SALES FLUENCY GUIDE

### Core Concepts — Plain English Definitions

**AI Automation**: A system that does repetitive tasks automatically, the same way every time, 24/7. No human needed once it's set up.

**Missed Call Text-Back**: When a call goes unanswered, a text goes out in 10 seconds saying "sorry we missed you, how can we help?" Catches leads that would otherwise go to your competitor.

**AI Receptionist**: A virtual phone answerer that can book appointments, answer FAQs, and route calls — like having a receptionist that never takes a break, never calls in sick, and works holidays.

**Lead Follow-Up Automation**: When someone fills out a form or calls, they automatically get a sequence of messages over the next few days keeping your business top of mind until they're ready to buy.

**Chatbot**: A widget on your website that answers customer questions instantly using your business's specific information — not generic answers.

### Stats to Drop in Conversation

- "Businesses miss 30% of inbound calls on average"
- "89% of consumers prefer texting over calling"
- "Speed-to-lead studies show responding within 5 minutes is 100x more likely to convert than waiting 30 minutes"
- "Most sales happen after 5-7 touches, but most businesses give up after one"
- "After-hours leads convert at the same rate as business-hours leads — if you respond fast enough"
- "78% of customers buy from the first business that responds"

### Diagnostic Questions (Socratic Method)

Don't tell them they have a problem. Ask questions that make them realize it:

- "How many calls did you miss last week?"
- "What happens to a lead that fills out your contact form at 9pm?"
- "How long does it take your team to follow up on a new inquiry?"
- "If someone calls and gets voicemail, what percentage do you think actually leaves a message?"
- "What's your busiest time of day? Who answers the phone during that?"

### How to Talk at Their Level

**Avoid these words**: AI model, automation workflow, API integration, CRM, pipeline, webhook, node, n8n, SaaS

**Use these instead**: System, automatic text, works in the background, keeps track of your leads, makes sure nobody falls through the cracks

### Analogy Bank

**AI Text-Back**: "It's like having someone sitting at the front desk 24/7 whose only job is to make sure no call goes unanswered."

**Follow-Up Sequence**: "Think of it like a drip coffee maker — you set it up once and it keeps dripping messages to your leads on a schedule until they're ready to buy."

**Automation**: "It's the same thing as setting your thermostat to turn on at 6am — except instead of temperature, it's customer follow-up. Set it, forget it, it just works."

**AI Receptionist**: "Imagine your best receptionist — the one who knows every service you offer, never puts anyone on hold too long, and never forgets to follow up. Now imagine she works 24/7 and never needs a day off."

**Chatbot**: "It's like having an employee on your website who's read every page, knows every answer, and responds instantly — even at 2am on a Sunday."

### Onboarding Email

Sent automatically on sign-up:
- Subject: "Welcome to Marceau Solutions — Let's Get You Automated"
- Includes: onboarding questionnaire link, kickoff call booking, timeline
- Template: `execution/send_onboarding_email.py`

### Technical Setup Checklist

- Auto-response messages customized
- Call forwarding or integration configured
- Monitoring dashboard set up
- Client notification preferences confirmed

## 8. SCALABILITY & FULL-STACK POSITIONING

### The Bigger Story — Tell This When They're Already Interested

We don't just build one automation. We build the full stack. Missed Call Text-Back is the entry point — the thing that proves we deliver. But the businesses winning right now are stacking AI systems on top of each other:

| Layer | What It Does | Monthly |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Missed Call Text-Back | Catches every missed call, instant reply | $297 |
| AI Receptionist | Answers calls, books appointments, routes FAQs | $500-1,000 |
| Review Management | Auto-requests Google reviews after service, responds to bad ones | +$200 |
| Lead Scoring | Prioritizes your hottest inbound leads so your team calls them first | +$200 |
| Appointment Booking | Self-service booking via SMS or web, 24/7, no receptionist needed | +$300 |
| Full Automation Stack | All of the above — CRM, follow-up sequences, dashboard | $2,000-5,000 |

### The Healthcare Angle (Use This With Dental, Med Spas, PT Clinics)

"Doctor's offices and medical practices are already doing this. A dental practice in Naples is using AI to:
- Text every missed call back within 10 seconds
- Send appointment reminders automatically (reduces no-shows 30-40%)
- Follow up with patients who haven't booked a cleaning in 12 months
- Request Google reviews after every positive visit

You're not early to AI — but you're early to AI that's THIS affordable and THIS simple to start. The practices that set this up in 2026 will have a serious competitive edge by 2027."

### When to Use This Positioning

- **After** they've shown interest in the text-back (don't lead with it — it overwhelms)
- **When** they ask "what else do you do?"
- **When** you're upselling after the trial proves results
- **With medical/dental/healthcare** leads — lead with this, because they respond to "other practices are doing this"

### The One-Liner Version

"We start with the easy win — missed calls. But we can build you an entire AI front office over time. Every layer we add works with everything else. You're building infrastructure, not just adding a tool."

---

## 9. DECISION LOG

### Why $297/month

Low enough to be a no-brainer for any business owner. High enough to be real revenue ($297 x 10 clients = $2,970 MRR). Competitors charge $300-500 for similar. At $297, the objection is almost always "let me think" not "too expensive."

### Why Free Setup for First 3 Clients

Case studies + testimonials are worth more than $1,491 in setup fees. 3 free clients with real results = proof that sells the next 10 at full price. Speed to social proof > speed to revenue.

### Why Local SMBs Over Mid-Market

14-day sprint. Owner-operators decide fast — often on the spot. No committees, no procurement process, no 6-month sales cycles. Walk in, demo, close.

### Why Missed Call Text-Back as the Opener

Easiest to explain ("texts people when you miss their call"). Fastest to prove (results in 48 hours). Clearest ROI (one recovered call = one month paid). Perfect foot-in-the-door for upselling to full automation.

### Why NOT Cold SMS

TCPA risk is $500-1,500 per unsolicited message. One complaint can trigger an FCC investigation. Email + phone + warm introductions only. Never cold-text a business owner who hasn't opted in.

### Why Naples

Wealthy market with high service demand. Dense concentration of service businesses in a small area. William's local network and physical presence. Affluent homeowners who use service businesses frequently.

### Why Hormozi Framework

Rule of 100 (volume). Big Fast Value (free setup, fast results). Loss aversion ("you're losing $4K/month"). Multi-touch follow-up (most respond after touch 3-5). Proven at scale across thousands of businesses.

---

## 10. DAILY METRICS

### What Gets Tracked Every Day

| Metric | Target | Where |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Outreach sent (warm + cold) | 10+/day | Google Sheets |
| Meetings booked | 2+/week | Calendly |
| Proposals/demos sent | 1+/week | Manual tracking |
| Clients signed | 1/week (sprint) | Stripe |
| Monthly Recurring Revenue | $297 x clients | Stripe dashboard |

### The Rule of 100

Every day, do at least ONE of:
- 100 minutes of outreach (calls, walk-ins, emails)
- 100 pieces of content (social posts, comments, DMs)
- 100 contacts reached (emails sent via Apollo)

You don't need all three. You need at least one, every single day.

### EOD Check-In

Report numbers to Clawdbot every evening:
- How many people did you reach out to today?
- Any meetings booked?
- Any proposals sent?
- What's your pipeline looking like?

## 13. QUICK REFERENCE CARD

### Before a Walk-In

- Know their business name
- Check their Google reviews for pain signals
- Check if they have a website / chat widget
- Have your phone ready to demo a missed call

### During a Walk-In

- "Hi, I'm William from Marceau Solutions. I work with local service businesses on something simple — when you miss a call, the customer gets an instant text back. Takes 2 minutes to show you how it works."
- If they're interested: show the demo on your phone
- If they're busy: leave a card, follow up by email same day

### On a Discovery Call

- Ask about their business first (2 min)
- Ask pain questions about missed calls (5 min)
- Agitate with the math (2 min)
- Show the solution (3 min)
- Close with free trial (3 min)

### After Closing

- Collect: phone number, hours, services, FAQs
- Build in n8n within 24 hours
- Test end-to-end on Day 2
- Go live Day 3
- Check-in Day 7 with results
